settings.heading: Stress & Back Pain Cost Your Business Millions
settings.description: 46% of all sick days in Denmark are due to stress and musculoskeletal disorders. We offer a free on-site APV assessment to identify risks and recommend solutions — completely non-binding.

settings.stat_text: of Danish employees experience physical discomfort at the workplace

settings.heading: The WOC Method®
settings.description: Sustainable performance through smart recovery. The WOC Method is built on science, experience, and humanity's natural need for recharging — proven since 2015 across industries and company sizes.

settings.title: Recovery
settings.text: WOC Balance Pro combines soothing massage with mental focus through mindfulness. Based on Carsten Rosendahl's research into the body's reaction to touch, rhythm, and warmth — a state we call active recovery.

settings.title: Development
settings.text: Since 2015, we have collaborated with leading researchers in stress management, mindfulness, and recovery. We inspire every employee to take responsibility for their own well-being and contribute to the well-being of colleagues.

settings.title: Analysis
settings.text: Continuous follow-up and employee surveys ensure real impact. Sustainable routines become a natural part of everyday life — documented with measurable results per workplace.

settings.heading: Calculate Your Savings
settings.description: Our wellness solution costs only 1.500 kr./month. See how it pays for itself through reduced sick leave.
